items.content_html: Yet another unofficial Obsidian plugin allowing users to synchronize notes between local device and the cloud service. Supports S3, Dropbox, OneDrive, webdav.
items.title: remotely-save/remotely-save: Yet another unofficial Obsidian plugin allowing users to synchronize notes between local device and the cloud service. Supports S3, Dropbox, OneDrive, webdav.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin allowing users to right click on a file to generate an encryption version of the file using a password.
items.title: remotely-save/crypt-it: Obsidian plugin allowing users to right click on a file to generate an encryption version of the file using a password.

items.content_html: Shows notes in the current folder, useful for writing novels

items.content_html: A theme for the Obsidian note-taking app, with strong color to distinguish different vaults, and support for many plugins.

items.content_html: Obsidian.md plugin which allows you to use your notes to embed, create, and update gists for Github and Opengist. Light & dark theme support, create / update public & private gists either manually or with autosave.
items.title: Aetherinox/obsidian-gistr: Obsidian.md plugin which allows you to use your notes to embed, create, and update gists for Github and Opengist. Light & dark theme support, create / update public & private gists either manually or with autosave.

items.content_html: 📃 • updated list of community themes & plugins for obsidian.md!
items.title: konhi/obsidian-community-list: 📃 • updated list of community themes & plugins for obsidian.md!

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin that gives you the power to generate dynamic MOCs in your folder notes. Enables folders to show up in the graph view and removes the need for messy tags!
items.title: IdreesInc/Waypoint: Obsidian plugin that gives you the power to generate dynamic MOCs in your folder notes. Enables folders to show up in the graph view and removes the need for messy tags!

items.content_html: (Mostly) reusable code to create messaging threads in Obsidian using the Dataview plugin. I will generalize this further and create sample Obsidian notes and templates later.
items.title: StevenLares/Messaging-Thread-View-for-Dataview-and-Obsidian: (Mostly) reusable code to create messaging threads in Obsidian using the Dataview plugin. I will generalize this further and create sample Obsidian notes and templates later.

items.content_html: Reusable script that maps out the schema for Obsidian subtags. Is primarly for use with the Dataview plugin and promotes a cross-domain approach to notetaking.
items.title: StevenLares/Obsidian-Dataview-Schema: Reusable script that maps out the schema for Obsidian subtags. Is primarly for use with the Dataview plugin and promotes a cross-domain approach to notetaking.
